hero.title: MKA STROY
hero.description: Design and installation of engineering systems for industrial facilities, airports and residential complexes in Kazakhstan and CIS.
hero.experience: Over 10 years of successful partnership with international corporations. More than 50 major projects completed.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Reliable partner in engineering construction
about.description: MKA STROY is an engineering and construction company with extensive experience in Kazakhstan and CIS countries. We specialize in the design and installation of engineering systems for facilities of any scale.
about.experience: Our clients include international corporations, airports, manufacturing facilities, and major residential complexes. Each project is executed by a team of highly qualified specialists using modern technologies.

geography.title: Wide Geography
geography.description: Projects in Kazakhstan and CIS countries

values.quality: Quality and reliability in every project

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive engineering solutions for your facility

drawer.title: Our Solutions
drawer.intro: MKA STROY LLP offers a wide range of installation services for residential, industrial, and office buildings.
drawer.supply: Our company also provides comprehensive supply of equipment for heating, water supply, sewerage, ventilation, and air conditioning systems directly from our partners — renowned manufacturers.
drawer.services: MKA STROY LLP provides a full range of installation and commissioning services for internal and external engineering networks of buildings and entire industrial or residential complexes, adhering to national and international standards.
drawer.scope: The company's activities cover all areas related to engineering networks of buildings and structures, including construction, major repairs, and reconstruction.
drawer.design: Upon your request, we can develop design and working documentation.
drawer.quality: MKA STROY LLP will ensure high-quality work execution within optimal timeframes and budget.
drawer.welcome: We look forward to welcoming you among our clients and partners!

list.coldHotWater: Cold and hot water supply networks
list.plumbing: Internal plumbing, heating, and sewerage systems

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about partnership

faq1.question: Which regions do you operate in?
faq1.answer: We complete projects across Kazakhstan and CIS countries: Uzbekistan, Tajikistan, Kyrgyzstan.

faq2.question: What types of facilities do you work with?
faq2.answer: We specialize in industrial facilities, airports, shopping centers, and residential complexes.

faq3.question: What warranties do you provide?
faq3.answer: Warranty on all types of work according to the contract. Warranty and post-warranty service.

faq4.question: How does the payment process work?
faq4.answer: We work under contract with staged payments. Advance payment, interim payments, and final settlement after completion.

faq5.question: What are the project timelines?
faq5.answer: Timelines depend on the scope and complexity. Installation for facilities up to 5,000 m² takes 2 to 4 months. Large industrial projects take 6 months or more.

faq6.question: Does the company have licenses?
faq6.answer: Yes, MKA STROY LLC holds all necessary licenses and permits for engineering and construction work in Kazakhstan and meets international standards.

faq7.question: What is the minimum project budget?
faq7.answer: We consider projects from 500,000 KZT. An individual estimate is prepared for each project after inspection.

faq8.question: What is the warranty period?
faq8.answer: 2 years on all types of completed work. Equipment carries the manufacturer’s warranty.
